children.heading: Enterprises
children.label: 1 Enterprises
children.text: The Director shall, by regulation, establish risk-based capital requirements for the enterprises to ensure that the enterprises operate in a safe and sound manner, maintaining sufficient capital and reserves to support the risks that arise in the operations and management of the enterprises.

children.heading: Federal Home Loan Banks
children.label: 2 Federal Home Loan Banks
children.text: The Director shall establish risk-based capital standards under for the Federal Home Loan Banks.section 1426 of this title

children.heading: No limitation
children.label: b No limitation
children.text: Nothing in this section shall limit the authority of the Director to require other reports or undertakings, or take other action, in furtherance of the responsibilities of the Director under this Act.
